source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for English product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese headings, body, labels, and numeric rhythm.
layout: Precise 8px content grids, petal-fold panels, reed-line dividers, dense authoring surfaces, and crisp riverbank hierarchy.

prompts.label: Transparent iris motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a blue iris bloom with stem and leaves, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A riverbank blue iris with folded indigo and violet petals, a visible golden throat, slender reed green leaves, fine petal veins, and accurate botanical structure.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop petals, leaves, or stem.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves petal folds, golden throat detail, and reed-like leaf edges.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no vase, no bouquet, no river scene, no decorative background, no second subject.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Iris" derived from a transparent cutout of a riverbank blue iris bloom with indigo-violet petals, visible golden throat markings, and reed green leaves.
Canvas and output: strict 16:9 landscape source board, 4096 x 2304 pixel composition, high-resolution, crisp readable text, no small dense labels.
Reference use: This light design-system board is the source reference for coding any future theme. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from iris indigo petals, violet folds, golden throat, reed green leaves, river grey shadows, river mist surfaces, and ink-blue depth.
Required visible sections: Morphous Iris, Blue Iris Bloom, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese product UI examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style content system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, petal-fold panels, reed-line separators, crisp editorial controls.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: iris indigo, petal violet, golden throat, reed green, river mist, river grey, wet reed, ink blue.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple gradient wash, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Iris".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the Morphous Iris design-system board for a riverbank blue iris bloom. It must feel like the same precise content system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use a transparent blue iris cutout and the light-mode Morphous Iris board concept as references: indigo-violet iris petals, golden throat markings, reed green leaves, river mist neutrals, river grey borders, wet reed shadows, and ink-blue depth. Preserve palette roles, component language, petal-fold texture, spacing, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Canvas and output: strict 16:9 landscape source board, 4096 x 2304 pixel composition, high-resolution, crisp readable text, no small dense labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Iris, Blue Iris Bloom, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from ink blue and wet reed, light text from river mist, primary accents from iris indigo, secondary accents from petal violet, golden throat focus and charts, reed green status, subtle folded-petal overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Iris".
